flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hanover College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.2k → $44.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hanover College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.2k → $44.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Hanover College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (63.6% vs 69.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hanover College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).
